infrastructure.name: package_version_check.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs version consistency checks across Cargo, npm, and other package manifests on PRs.

infrastructure.name: pr-auto-update-with-rebase.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically rebases PRs with the main branch when triggered by a label or comment, using concurrency controls to prevent races.

infrastructure.name: pr-title-checker.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that validates PR titles conform to the project's conventional commit format using the pr-title-checker action.

infrastructure.name: protobuf-breaking.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that detects breaking changes in protobuf schema definitions using buf CLI on PRs that modify `.proto` files.

infrastructure.name: run-main-cron.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers the main Buildkite CI pipeline on a nightly cron schedule to run comprehensive test suites.

infrastructure.name: run-perf-test.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers performance benchmark tests on dedicated infrastructure when manually dispatched or on schedule.

infrastructure.name: slt-coverage-check.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that checks SQLLogicTest (SLT) coverage, verifying that new SQL features have corresponding test files.

infrastructure.name: stale.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically marks and closes stale issues and PRs after configurable periods of inactivity.

infrastructure.name: trigger-homebrew-bump.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers a Homebrew formula update for RisingWave when a new release is published, keeping the brew tap in sync.

infrastructure.name: typo.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that scans the codebase for typos using the `typos` tool on PRs and pushes, enforcing the project allowlist from `.typos.toml`.

list.name: SQL Frontend
list.description: SQL parsing, query planning, optimization, and scheduling — the entry point for all SQL queries in RisingWave, encompassing the binder, planner, optimizer, and the standalone SQL parser crate.

list.name: Expression Engine
list.description: Scalar and aggregate expression evaluation used across both streaming and batch execution, including built-in functions, type coercion, and expression compilation.

list.name: Stream Processing Engine
list.description: Streaming execution runtime responsible for dataflow graph execution, operator executors, barrier protocol, watermarks, and stateful stream-processing logic.

list.name: Batch Processing Engine
list.description: Batch query execution engine handling ad-hoc queries against materialized views, including distributed batch planning, exchange operators, and local task execution.

list.name: Meta Service
list.description: Cluster-wide metadata management, catalog storage, barrier coordination, actor scheduling, and SeaORM-backed persistence for all distributed system state.

list.name: Storage Engine
list.description: Cloud-native Hummock LSM-tree storage engine, object-store abstraction over S3/GCS/HDFS, and the DML subsystem for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE operations.

list.name: Connector Layer
list.description: Source and sink connectors for external systems (Kafka, Pulsar, Kinesis, CDC, Iceberg, and more), JNI bridge to the Java connector node, and the Java-side connector runtime.

list.name: Server & RPC Infrastructure
list.description: Binary entry points (compute node, all-in-one), gRPC service definitions in Protobuf, generated Prost bindings, RPC client wrappers, and the internal diagnostic control (ctl) CLI.

list.name: Common & Shared Utilities
list.description: Cross-cutting shared libraries including core data types, array representations, session config, hash utilities, error codes, async runtime helpers, and workspace dependency management.

list.name: Testing, Operations & Developer Tools
list.description: End-to-end SQLLogicTest suites, simulation and integration test harnesses, CI pipeline scripts, Docker/Grafana configurations, the risedev developer tool, documentation, and project configuration files.

document:docs/dev/src/metrics.md.summary: Developer reference for key RisingWave performance metrics, focusing on barrier latency as an indicator of system health, processing cost, and buffer capacity utilization.

document:docs/dev/src/observability.md.name: observability.md
document:docs/dev/src/observability.md.summary: Developer guide to RisingWave observability tools including meta dashboard cluster control, Grafana monitoring, distributed tracing, the web dashboard, and log configuration.

document:docs/dev/src/benchmark-and-prof.name: cpu-profiling.md
document:docs/dev/src/benchmark-and-prof.summary: Developer guide for CPU profiling RisingWave using flamegraphs, covering profiling on the host via perf/cargo-flamegraph, profiling remote compute nodes via curl, and profiling on macOS.

document:docs/dev/src/benchmark-and-prof.name: memory-profiling.md
document:docs/dev/src/benchmark-and-prof.summary: Comprehensive heap profiling guide (228 lines) covering jemalloc-based memory collection, manual profiling, cloud dashboard profiling, jeprof analysis, and flame graph visualization for diagnosing RisingWave memory usage.

document:docs/dev/src/benchmark-and-prof.name: microbenchmarks.md
document:docs/dev/src/benchmark-and-prof.summary: Guide for running Rust micro-benchmarks (Criterion/Iai) in RisingWave and generating flamegraphs for micro-benchmark results.

document:docs/dev/src/design/aggregation.name: aggregation.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/aggregation.summary: Design document explaining RisingWave's streaming aggregation architecture, covering the frontend planner, expression framework, HashAggExecutor, and AggGroup initialization for incremental aggregation.

document:docs/dev/src/design/architectur.name: architecture-design.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/architectur.summary: High-level architecture design document describing RisingWave's component topology, motivation for the cloud-native design, and both batch-query and streaming execution modes.

document:docs/dev/src/design/backfill.md.name: backfill.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/backfill.md.summary: In-depth design document (396 lines) for RisingWave's backfill mechanism covering NoShuffle Backfill, Arrangement Backfill, CDC Backfill, and Source Backfill with details on schemas, polling loops, replication, recovery, and scaling.

document:docs/dev/src/design/batch-local.name: batch-local-execution-mode.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/batch-local.summary: Design document for the batch local execution mode that enables low-latency online serving queries by running batch plans on the frontend node without distributed scheduling overhead.

document:docs/dev/src/design/checkpoint..name: checkpoint.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/checkpoint..summary: Design document explaining RisingWave's streaming checkpoint mechanism, consistency model (epoch-based), barrier injection approach, and how state is persisted to the object store.

document:docs/dev/src/design/consistent-.name: consistent-hash.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/consistent-.summary: Design document for RisingWave's consistent hash mechanism used to distribute stream actors across compute nodes, covering meta scheduling, data distribution, redistribution, and per-layer implications.

document:docs/dev/src/design/data-model-.name: data-model-and-encoding.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/data-model-.summary: Design document describing RisingWave's relational data model and encoding formats, covering the in-memory row representation and the on-disk memcomparable encoding for storage.

document:docs/dev/src/design/keys.md.name: keys.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/keys.md.summary: Design document explaining the distinction between stream keys (used for routing and deduplication in streaming) and primary keys (used for storage ordering and lookup).

document:docs/dev/src/design/match-recog.name: match-recognize.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/match-recog.summary: Design document for RisingWave's MATCH_RECOGNIZE (row pattern recognition) implementation, covering feature support, the NFA-based planning pipeline, executor design, and fault tolerance.

document:docs/dev/src/design/meta-servic.name: meta-service.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/meta-servic.summary: Design document for the RisingWave meta service, covering its role as the control plane, the metadata store, types of metadata (catalog, storage), and the push-on-update subscription model.

document:docs/dev/src/design/multi-objec.name: multi-object-store.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/multi-objec.summary: Design document describing how RisingWave supports multiple object storage backends (S3, GCS, OSS, Azure Blob, HDFS, OpenDAL) and build instructions for each backend.

document:docs/dev/src/design/mv-on-mv.md.name: mv-on-mv.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/mv-on-mv.md.summary: Design document for materialized-view-on-materialized-view support in RisingWave, explaining the broadcast operator, online MV creation with backfill, and online MV drop procedures.

document:docs/dev/src/design/relational-.name: relational-table.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/relational-.summary: Design document for storing streaming operator state as relational tables in Hummock, covering row encoding, the relational table layer, write/read paths, and state storage patterns (value state, extreme state).

document:docs/dev/src/design/shared-buff.name: shared-buffer.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/shared-buff.summary: Design document for the Hummock shared buffer, detailing async checkpoint and write-anytime/async-flush mechanisms with separate write/read path descriptions and merge iterator design.

document:docs/dev/src/design/state-store.name: state-store-overview.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/state-store.summary: Comprehensive overview of the Hummock state store, covering architecture, user API, internal storage format, write/read paths, compaction, transaction management, and streaming checkpointing.

document:docs/dev/src/design/streaming-o.name: streaming-overview.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/streaming-o.summary: Overview of the RisingWave streaming engine architecture, describing actors, executors, state management, barrier-based checkpointing, consistency model, and fault tolerance mechanisms.

document:docs/dev/src/design/streaming-p.name: streaming-parallelism.md
document:docs/dev/src/design/streaming-p.summary: Design document for streaming parallelism in RisingWave, explaining value semantics, resolution rules for fragment parallelism, configuration examples, and migration behavior during scale-out.

document:docs/rustdoc/README.md.name: README.md
document:docs/rustdoc/README.md.summary: Brief readme explaining the rustdoc documentation setup for RisingWave, pointing to the index page and custom CSS override file.

document:docs/rustdoc/index.md.name: index.md
document:docs/rustdoc/index.md.summary: Landing page for RisingWave developer documentation, indexing links to design docs, crate API docs for core components (stream, batch, frontend, storage, meta, connector, common, utils).

file:docs/rustdoc/rust.css.name: rust.css
file:docs/rustdoc/rust.css.summary: Custom CSS stylesheet for the RisingWave rustdoc pages, overriding default rustdoc styles to match project branding and improve readability.
